visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a person's hand holding a 3D-printed model of a foldable phone, showing its black screen against a light wooden background. (2) A man wearing glasses, a patterned cap, and a denim shirt appears in a bright retail store environment with mobile phone displays in the background. (3) He is then shown in a studio with a purple and blue background, wearing a red long-sleeved shirt and holding the white phone model. (4) A close-up side view highlights the slimness of the white device. (5) The man continues speaking in the studio, gesturing with his hands. (6) A close-up of the foldable model's black front screen is shown. (7) Two slim devices are compared side-by-side to show thickness. (8) The man holds the foldable model in the studio, demonstrating its size. (9) An unfolded view of the device shows a large black screen area. (10) The man explains features while holding the device. (11) A hand grips the device, with a thumb attempting to reach across the screen. (12) A close-up of the top edge of the device points out a sensor hole. (13) The man looks at the device in his hands. (14) A red circle overlay highlights the side edge of the white model. (15) The man compares the 3D-printed model with another white smartphone. (16) A comparison of the rear camera modules of two devices is shown. (17) The man gestures toward the camera while talking. (18) A side-by-side comparison between a functional Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 and the 3D-printed model is presented. (19) The man concludes by holding both devices and speaking directly to the viewer.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 傳聞的. [Logo]: 3c意思tim哥. [Logo]: miko米可手機館. (2) [Subtitle]: iPhone摺疊. (3) [Subtitle]: 被3D列印出來了. (4) [Subtitle]: 快速來跟大家分享. (5) [Subtitle]: 推薦大家. (6) [Subtitle]: 買手機到米可. (7) [Subtitle]: 這一次的3D列印. (8) [Logo]: Maker World. [Subtitle]: 流出來的. (9) [Subtitle]: 外螢幕 5.4-5.5吋. [Subtitle]: 內螢幕 7.6-7.8吋. (10) [Subtitle]: 厚薄度. (11) [Subtitle]: 外螢幕 5.4吋. (12) [Subtitle]: 厚薄度跟Fold 7. (13) [Subtitle]: 一模一樣的薄. (14) [Subtitle]: 7.6-7.8吋. (15) [Subtitle]: 手握感. (16) [Subtitle]: 我大拇指扣不到旁邊了. (17) [Variety]: Face-ID. (18) [Variety]: Touch ID. (19) [Subtitle]: 我拿我的Air出來一看. (20) [Variety]: 雙鏡頭. (21) [Variety]: Galaxy Z Fold 7. [Variety]: iPhone Fold. (22) [Subtitle]: 你們買單哪個尺寸啊.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main male presenter appearing throughout.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey patterned flat cap, and alternating between a denim shirt and a vibrant red long-sleeved sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video features two main backgrounds: a mobile phone retail store with glass display cases and wooden shelving, and a professional studio with a multi-toned purple and blue background panel.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks energetically over a bright, rhythmic electronic backing track. (2) A subtle 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a camera cut. (3) The speaker's tone remains high-arousal and friendly, providing technical specs of the phone model. (4) A 'pop' sound effect is heard when a comparison graphic appears on screen. (5) The BGM tempo remains consistent as the speaker asks a closing question with a rising pitch contour.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Technical Specs -> Physical Comparison -> Interactive Question
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a 3D-printed leak of a rumored foldable iPhone, comparing its physical dimensions and features with current market competitors like the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 to generate engagement and discussion.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presence of a retail store logo (miko) and a verbal recommendation to buy phones at that specific store.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-paced editing and social media-style overlays to maintain viewer attention while reviewing a mock-up tech product.
